name: How do I measure whether Google Assistant optimization is working?
description: Track featured snippets, local visibility, and query impressions. Also test real voice-style questions on devices to see what answer Google returns.

mainEntity.name: How do I measure whether Google Assistant optimization is working?

acceptedAnswer.text: A simple way to measure progress is to track which queries trigger your site, which pages win featured snippets, and how often your Google Business Profile appears in local results. For voice-specific testing, use the same question phrasing customers would actually say.
acceptedAnswer.description: Track featured snippets, local visibility, and query impressions. Also test real voice-style questions on devices to see what answer Google returns.
